response.justification: Maria has extensive experience in software engineering, including roles in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, which aligns with the AI strategy focus. However, her resume lacks explicit AI/ML product development, cloud platform strategy leadership, or entrepreneurial experience in AI-related ventures. Her technical depth in AI is not clearly demonstrated beyond infrastructure contributions.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies
Strong background in full-stack development, including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining the open-source GISCollective platform
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or platform building with AI
Lacks explicit mention of cloud platform strategy or cloud technologies leadership
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is in GIS, not AI or cloud services
